# llms.txt — MottoBiz
## AI Business Automation Studio — Surat, Gujarat

> MottoBiz helps solopreneurs and small businesses in Surat automate daily operations — WhatsApp follow-ups, social media, lead pipelines — without hiring a team.

**Last updated**: 2026-05-30
**Website**: https://mottobiz.com
**Location**: Surat, Gujarat, India

---

## Overview

MottoBiz is Surat's first AI business automation studio. We build AI agents that handle business workflows autonomously — responding to customer inquiries, qualifying leads, following up, posting to social media, and generating reports. Our clients are non-technical business owners who want the power of automation without the complexity.

## Target Audience

- Solopreneurs in Surat looking to scale without hiring
- Small businesses in Gujarat seeking digital transformation
- Non-technical business owners who want automation without complexity
- Textile traders, diamond merchants, restaurant owners, real estate agents, coaching centers, and retail shop owners

## Core Services

### Smart Website Development
- High-converting, SEO-optimized websites with lead capture
- Timeline: 2-3 weeks

### AI Automation
- WhatsApp auto-replies, follow-ups, intelligent workflows
- Timeline: 2-4 weeks for initial agent deployment

### Social Media Automation
- Automated content creation and scheduling across platforms
- Timeline: 1-2 weeks

### Business Intelligence
- Analytics dashboards and reporting systems
- Timeline: 3-4 weeks

### Workflow Automation
- n8n, Make.com, custom integrations to connect business tools
- Timeline: 2-4 weeks

### Lead Pipeline Automation
- Capture, qualify, and convert leads automatically
- Timeline: 2-4 weeks

## Pricing (Machine-Readable)

See full pricing at: https://mottobiz.com/pricing.md

**Quick summary:**
- **Starter**: ₹5,000/month — 1-2 workflows, email/WhatsApp support
- **Professional**: ₹10,000/month — 3-5 workflows, priority support
- **Enterprise**: ₹15,000+/month — Unlimited workflows, dedicated support
- **Free 30-minute audit**: Always included, no obligation
- **No lock-in**: Cancel anytime with 30 days notice

## Key Differentiators

1. Surat's first dedicated AI automation studio
2. Built entirely for non-technical business owners
3. Hindi, Gujarati, and English support
4. Maximum 5-8 clients for quality over quantity
5. Optional handover after 12 months — full documentation and training
6. No lock-in contracts

## Statistics

- **25+** Surat businesses automated
- **Lead capture**: From 40% to 95%+ with automation
- **Response time**: From hours to under 10 seconds
- **Time saved**: 3-5 hours/day for typical textile trader
- **Cost**: Fraction of ₹3-5L/year employee cost
